name: Gather Round Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt together butterscotch morsels, instant coffee, and water in a double boiler.
2. Cream together butter and sugar.
3. Add the melted butterscotch mixture to the creamed butter and sugar.
4. Gradually add flour, soda, and salt to the creamed mixture, alternating with buttermilk.
5. Mix in eggs one at a time.
6. Beat until smooth.
7. Pour batter into a greased 12-cup, 10-inch Bundt pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 55-60 minutes.
9. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
